options.name: -areaIo
options.description: place jtag cells only along the boundary of area IO cells

options.name: -blockNetWeight
options.description: > # specify net weight to io nets

options.name: -contour
options.description: place jtag cells only along the boundary using contour

options.name: -hardMacro
options.description: place jtag cells also along the boundary of hardmacros

options.name: -ignoreScan
options.description: place jtag with scan chain ignored

options.name: -ioNetWeight
options.description: > # specify net weight to io nets

options.name: -nrRow
options.description: > # number of row at boundary to place jtag inst

options.name: -nrRowBottom
options.description: > # number of row at bottom boundary to place jtag inst

options.name: -nrRowLeft
options.description: > # number of row at left boundary to place jtag inst

options.name: -nrRowRight
options.description: > # number of row at right boundary to place jtag inst

options.name: -nrRowTop
options.description: > # number of row at top boundary to place jtag inst

options.name: -orientBottom
options.description: <R0|R90|R180|R270|MX|MX90|MY|MY90> orient of small blocks placed at bottom boundray

options.name: -orientLeft
options.description: <R0|R90|R180|R270|MX|MX90|MY|MY90> orient of small blocks placed at left boundray

options.name: -orientRight
options.description: <R0|R90|R180|R270|MX|MX90|MY|MY90> orient of small blocks placed at right boundray

options.name: -orientTop
options.description: <R0|R90|R180|R270|MX|MX90|MY|MY90> orient of small blocks placed at top boundray
